title: Admin Panel — Backend API (NestJS)
description: REST API built with NestJS and PostgreSQL on Neon, with file storage on Cloudinary. Implements Firebase authentication, input validation, protected routes, exception handling, and modular architecture following best practices.

title: HR Management System — Nexus
description: Human resources management system developed with Angular and Spring Boot. Covers employee management, hiring workflows, and absence tracking, with a focus on efficiency and usability.

title: Portfolio
description: This portfolio — built with Angular 21, Tailwind CSS v4, and a signal-based architecture. Features bilingual content (EN/ES), system-aware dark mode, lazy-loaded sections, and typed content models. Designed to communicate technical depth and product mindset.
